title: Why Neanderthals Might Be Our Cousins After All - David Reich
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews geneticist David Reich on the possibility that Neanderthals may represent a collateral human lineage rather than a direct ancestor. The discussion likely examines genetic evidence and evolutionary relationships between archaic and modern humans.
